title: CAD Gallery Configuration
description: Configuration for the CAD Gallery build pipeline

title.description: Gallery title shown in the header and browser tab

metadata_dir.description: Directory containing metadata YAML files and images

output_dir.description: Output directory for the generated gallery site

custom_css.description: Path to a custom CSS file that is loaded after the default styles. Use this to override colors, fonts, spacing, or any other styling without modifying the base templates.
